nadi_shodhana.name: Nadi Shodhana (Alternate Nostril Breathing)
nadi_shodhana.steps: Sit comfortably. Close right nostril, inhale left; close left, exhale right; inhale right, close right, exhale left. Repeat gently for 5 minutes.

kapalabhati.name: Kapalabhati (Skull-Shining Breath)
kapalabhati.steps: Sit tall. Sharp, forceful exhales through the nose with passive inhales, about 1-2 per second, in short rounds with rest between.
cautions: Avoid with hypertension or heart disease.

bhramari.name: Bhramari (Humming Bee Breath)
bhramari.steps: Close eyes and ears gently, inhale, then exhale slowly while humming like a bee. Repeat 8-10 rounds.

sheetali.name: Sheetali (Cooling Breath)
sheetali.steps: Curl the tongue lengthwise (or purse lips if unable), inhale slowly through the mouth, exhale through the nose. Repeat 8-10 rounds.
cautions: Avoid in very cold weather or with respiratory congestion.

ujjayi.name: Ujjayi (Ocean Breath)
ujjayi.steps: Breathe through the nose with a slight throat constriction, creating a soft ocean-like sound on both inhale and exhale.
